title: Sandpaper
description: A modpack made for the Glitchcord minecraft server. featuring an emphasis on Create and Bewitchment.
body:
A pack focusing around Create and Bewitchment with some bonus mods to make interesting! Use Valkyrian skies to bring your create contraptions airborn as you journey between points of interest added by YUNG's suite of structures and stunning biomes from terralith. This pack also adds many utility mods like gravity API and Pehkui for server admins to mess around with and use with custom origins (comming soon).
